phrases.intent_en: Ask where the kiosk drink counter is
phrases.text_local: Onde está o balcão de bebidas do quiosque?
phrases.pronunciation: ON-jee es-TAH-w oo bahl-SOWN-jee be-bee-DAHS-doo kee-OS-kee
phrases.cultural_note: Kiosks at Portuguese coastal attractions typically serve drinks and light snacks.

likely_response.local: Bom dia, no quiosque junto ao estacionamento.
likely_response.pronunciation: BOHNG DEEUH, NOO KEEOHSH-kih ZHOONNG-too OW shtuh-seeoo-nuh-MAYNG-too.
likely_response.translation_en: Good morning, at the kiosk near the parking lot.

responses.english: Good morning, at the kiosk near the parking lot.
responses.phonetic: BOHNG DEEUH, NOO KEEOHSH-kih ZHOONNG-too OW shtuh-seeoo-nuh-MAYNG-too.
responses.local: Bom dia, no quiosque junto ao estacionamento.

phrases.text_local: Onde posso apreciar a vista do arco rochoso?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih PAW-soo uhp-rih-SEEAHR AH VEESH-tuh DOO AH-ruh-koo roo-SHOH-zoo?

likely_response.local: Siga as placas para a plataforma de observação costeira.
likely_response.pronunciation: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AH pluh-tuh-FAW-ruh-muh DIH awb-sih-ruh-vuh-SOWN koosh-TAY-ruh.
likely_response.translation_en: Follow the signs to the coastal viewing platform.

responses.english: Follow the signs to the coastal viewing platform.
responses.phonetic: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AH pluh-tuh-FAW-ruh-muh DIH awb-sih-ruh-vuh-SOWN koosh-TAY-ruh.
responses.local: Siga as placas para a plataforma de observação costeira.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the viewing platform is
phrases.text_local: Onde fica a plataforma de observação costeira?
phrases.pronunciation: ON-jee FI-ka uh pla-ta-FOR-ma jee-ob-ser-va-SOWN cos-TAY-rah (de links as jee)
phrases.cultural_note: Coastal viewpoints in Cascais are often integrated into natural rock formations.

likely_response.local: Bom dia, junto ao arco natural.
likely_response.pronunciation: BOHNG DEEUH, ZHOONNG-too OW AH-ruh-koo nuh-too-RAHL.
likely_response.translation_en: Good morning, near the natural arch.

responses.english: Good morning, near the natural arch.
responses.phonetic: BOHNG DEEUH, ZHOONNG-too OW AH-ruh-koo nuh-too-RAHL.
responses.local: Bom dia, junto ao arco natural.

phrases.text_local: Onde fica a plataforma de observação do Arco Natural?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih FEE-kuh AH pluh-tuh-FAW-ruh-muh DIH awb-sih-ruh-vuh-SOWN DOO AH-ruh-koo nuh-too-RAHL?

likely_response.local: Siga as placas para a plataforma de observação costeira.
likely_response.pronunciation: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AH pluh-tuh-FAW-ruh-muh DIH awb-sih-ruh-vuh-SOWN koosh-TAY-ruh.
likely_response.translation_en: Follow the signs to the coastal viewing platform.

responses.english: Follow the signs to the coastal viewing platform.
responses.phonetic: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AH pluh-tuh-FAW-ruh-muh DIH awb-sih-ruh-vuh-SOWN koosh-TAY-ruh.
responses.local: Siga as placas para a plataforma de observação costeira.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the kiosk drink counter is
phrases.text_local: Onde fica o balcão de bebidas do quiosque?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih FEE-kuh AW bahl-KOWN DIH beh-BEE-duhsh DOO KEEOHSH-kih?
phrases.cultural_note: The kiosk near the parking lot also sells drinks and snacks.

likely_response.local: Bom dia, no quiosque do estacionamento.
likely_response.pronunciation: BOHNG DEEUH, NOO KEEOHSH-kih DOO shtuh-seeoo-nuh-MAYNG-too.
likely_response.translation_en: Good morning, at the parking lot kiosk.

responses.english: Good morning, at the parking lot kiosk.
responses.phonetic: BOHNG DEEUH, NOO KEEOHSH-kih DOO shtuh-seeoo-nuh-MAYNG-too.
responses.local: Bom dia, no quiosque do estacionamento.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where to validate parking tickets
phrases.text_local: Onde se valida o bilhete de estacionamento?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih SIH vuh-LEE-duh AW bee-LYEH-tih DIH shtuh-seeoo-nuh-MAYNG-too?
phrases.cultural_note: Parking validation machines are typically located near attraction exits in Portugal.

likely_response.local: Bom dia, pergunte ao fiscal de estacionamento.
likely_response.pronunciation: BOHNG DEEUH, peh-ruh-GOONNG-tih OW feesh-KAHL DIH shtuh-seeoo-nuh-MAYNG-too.
likely_response.translation_en: Good morning, ask the parking attendant.

responses.english: Good morning, ask the parking attendant.
responses.phonetic: BOHNG DEEUH, peh-ruh-GOONNG-tih OW feesh-KAHL DIH shtuh-seeoo-nuh-MAYNG-too.
responses.local: Bom dia, pergunte ao fiscal de estacionamento.

phrases.text_local: Onde posso validar o meu bilhete de estacionamento?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih PAW-soo vuh-lee-DAHR AW MEHOO bee-LYEH-tih DIH shtuh-seeoo-nuh-MAYNG-too?

likely_response.local: Dirija-se ao fiscal de estacionamento para validação.
likely_response.pronunciation: dee-REE-zhuh-SIH OW feesh-KAHL DIH shtuh-seeoo-nuh-MAYNG-too PUH-ruh vuh-lee-duh-SOWN.
likely_response.translation_en: Go to the parking attendant for validation.

responses.english: Go to the parking attendant for validation.
responses.phonetic: dee-REE-zhuh-SIH OW feesh-KAHL DIH shtuh-seeoo-nuh-MAYNG-too PUH-ruh vuh-lee-duh-SOWN.
responses.local: Dirija-se ao fiscal de estacionamento para validação.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the viewing platform is
phrases.text_local: Onde fica a plataforma de observação?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih FEE-kuh AH pluh-tuh-FAW-ruh-muh DIH awb-sih-ruh-vuh-SOWN?
phrases.cultural_note: The viewing platform is the main attraction point; it's a natural rock arch.

likely_response.translation_en: Good morning, at the coastal platform.

responses.english: Good morning, at the coastal platform.
